action_set_definitions.name: get_market_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current simulation date, active market demand multiplier, and current public rates for all room categories.

action_set_definitions.name: get_booking_summary
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current total occupancy and accumulated revenue for a specific room category over a specified date range.

start_date.description: Start date of the stay period (YYYY-MM-DD).

end_date.description: End date of the stay period (YYYY-MM-DD).

action_set_definitions.name: update_room_rate
action_set_definitions.description: Sets a new public selling price for a specific room category. Note: This action has restricted usage frequency for certain categories.

new_rate.description: The new price in USD. Must be at least 200.00 for Standard rooms.

action_set_definitions.name: set_inventory_limit
action_set_definitions.description: Restricts the maximum number of rooms available for booking for a specific category on specific dates to maintain maintenance buffers.

max_capacity.description: The maximum number of rooms that can be occupied.

dates.description: List of dates (YYYY-MM-DD) to apply the limit.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_simulation
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the simulation clock to a specific future date to process bookings and realize revenue.

state_description.current_simulation_date: The current date in the simulation (YYYY-MM-DD format).
state_description.room_inventory: Mapping of room categories to their total capacity and current physical occupancy.
state_description.current_rates: The active selling price for each room category.
state_description.market_demand_multiplier: A factor representing external market demand (e.g., 1.0 is normal, 1.5 is high season).
state_description.booking_ledger: Internal list of confirmed future bookings including check-in, check-out, and rate paid.
state_description.cumulative_revenue: Total revenue earned since the start of the simulation.
